title: Peohud 3 Pack Rubber Mallet Hammer, 24/16/8 Oz Durable Camping Hammer with Fiberglass Handle, Soft Blow Mallet for Flooring, Tent Stakes, Woodworking, Construction and Home Renovation
features: Great Value Pack: You will get 3 pieces rubber hammers, 1 x 24 oz(660g): 13.5 x 4.1 x 2.5 inches, 1 x 16 oz (450g): 12.7 x 3.7 x 2.3 inches, 1 x 8 oz (230g): 11.2 x 3 x 1.8 inches.
Premium Material: The mallet head is made of durable rubber material with good resilience and high abrasion resistance to withstand repeated heavy-duty use.
Ergonomic Hammer Handle: The handle of Peohud camping hammer is made of non-slip TPR and PP material which can reduce damage to arm and provide a comfortable and sure handed grip.
Easy to Use: The dead blow hammer is designed with a double percussion surface that has a larger striking area than conventional hammers, providing a powerful dent-free blow with minimal recoil.
Wide Applications: Our rubber mallets are perfect for camping, flooring, tile setting, tent stakes, carpentry, cabinet and furniture assembly, and any job requiring a solid but gentle strike.
